query: SELECT id, userId, CASE WHEN tradierApiKey IS NOT NULL AND tradierApiKey != '' THEN 'SET' ELSE 'NULL/EMPTY' END as tradierKeyStatus, LEFT(tradierApiKey, 10) as keyPrefix FROM apiCredentials LIMIT 5;
